generated_oml:
instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within Building Control System for monitoring physical parameters"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSDataTransmitted
]

instance BCSDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance BCSData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from Building Control System sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataIntegrationEnabler
]

instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric models from Building Information Modeling (BIM) enriched with behavioral representations of Building Control System (BCS) components including sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDETransformationEnabler
]

instance DTModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured Digital Twin artifacts generated via Model-Driven Engineering from enriched BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataIntegrationEnabler
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control System for controlling building systems"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers within Building Control System for managing system operations"
]

instance MDETransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tool for transforming enriched BIM models into deployable Digital Twin artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance DataIntegrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified semantic foundation for consistent data integration from physical infrastructure to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance ScalableArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for scaling DT instances across infrastructure systems"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems using synchronized data from physical infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure maintenance and failure prevention"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for scenario analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance AnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of building performance data for optimization opportunities"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnalysisInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of building systems for energy efficiency and cost reduction"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Decision-making support for facility management and operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance RealTimeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current operational status of building systems"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted equipment failures or maintenance needs"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted outcomes of operational scenarios"
]

instance AnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance metrics and efficiency opportunities"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommended adjustments for optimal system performance"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable recommendations for facility management decisions"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building or infrastructure asset in AECO domain for lifecycle management from design to refurbishment"
    base:contains BCSSensor, BCSActuator, BCSController, BIMEnrichedModel, DTModel, DataIntegrationEnabler, RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService, DecisionSupportService, ScalableArchitecture
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts for monitoring and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework acting as a hub for bidirectional data exchange, coordinating specialized roles (Building Control Engineers for device modeling, Facility Managers for monitoring/control, DT Engineers for service integration) and modular components with standardized extension points for custom service integration, enabling holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environment (defining sensors, actuators, and controllers), Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to generate structured representations and deployable artifacts, real-time data synchronization between physical and digital systems, interactive visualization for monitoring and control operations, and modular extension via custom services. Governance is managed by stakeholder roles: Building Control Engineers initiate deployment, Facility Managers monitor system states, and DT Engineers develop and integrate custom services."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems via standardized extension points and BIM model integration, with non-functional requirements addressing system-wide interoperability but no specific data exchange protocols or standards detailed in the documents."
]
